author: Barbatos Labs
name: Barbatos.Wpf App (Aquarius + Core + i18n)
description: A starter WPF app referencing Barbatos.Wpf.Core (MAUI-style hosting/DI), Barbatos.Wpf.Aquarius (Vue-style reactivity/Setup), and Barbatos.i18n (localization) together: Setup.ServiceProvider is wired to Core's DI container so Views resolve ViewModels through the same graph, and that same container backs Barbatos.i18n.Wpf's {i18n:StringLocalizer} markup extension via UseWpfLocalization - all three work together rather than merely coexisting.

PackageVersion.description: Version of Barbatos.Wpf.Core/Barbatos.Wpf.Aquarius to reference - override with --PackageVersion if it has moved on from the default by the time you use this.
